category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/raftario/licensor describes it as writing a license to standard output given an SPDX ID.
source_facts.description says licensor writes licenses to stdout.

docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/raftario/licensor#readme contains About, Features, Usage, and implementation notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/raftario/licensor; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/raftario/licensor lists cli, licensing, license, and spdx topics and shows Rust as the implementation language.
